table_trans: The Proposal: -
There are 500 government ashramshalas functioning under the Tribal Development Department in the state.
More than 2 lakh students are studying in Ashramshalas.
Central / Semi-Interventional kitchens to be set up by the Department for the purpose of providing nutritious food.
At present, 5 central kitchens are functioning in the state and now 8 more in the near future.
Central / Semi-Central kitchens to come up. 5 Central kitchens currently operational in the state
The menu for the kitchen has been fixed by the Government Decision dated 28th February, 2024 at Reference No.6.
was done. Central / Central to be started by the department now and to be started in future.
The issue of fixing the menu for the semi-intermittent kitchen was under the consideration of the government.

para_trans: Government Decision No: Shaasha1126 / Q. 142 / Q. 13 (AD. 1689326)
The Commissioner, Tribal Development, directed the project officers, students and their parents as well as suppliers.
The students were given a varied and nutritious diet depending on the local geographical situation.
For serving as well as for snacks and meals in all central / semi-central kitchens under the division.

submitted for approval. Revised menu for snacks and meals as per Annexure-I
